simple: Digunakan untuk kebiasaan, fakta umum, dan jadwal tetap.
formula:
Positive: S + V1
Negative: S + do/does not + V1
Question: Do/Does + S + V1?
mistake:
She study English. ❌
She studies English. ✅
ieltsTip: Berguna untuk Writing Task 2 ketika menjelaskan fakta umum atau opini umum.

simple: Digunakan untuk kegiatan yang sedang terjadi sekarang atau rencana dekat.
formula:
Positive: S + am/is/are + V-ing
Negative: S + am/is/are not + V-ing
Question: Am/Is/Are + S + V-ing?
mistake:
I learning English. ❌
I am learning English. ✅
ieltsTip: Bisa dipakai di Speaking Part 1 saat menjelaskan aktivitas sekarang.

simple: Digunakan untuk kejadian yang selesai di masa lalu.
formula:
Positive: S + V2
Negative: S + did not + V1
Question: Did + S + V1?
example: I joined an English club last year.
mistake:
I did not studied. ❌
I did not study. ✅
ieltsTip: Sering muncul di Speaking Part 2 ketika menceritakan pengalaman.

simple: Digunakan untuk rencana, prediksi, dan keputusan masa depan.
formula:
Will: S + will + V1
Going to: S + am/is/are going to + V1
example: I will take the IELTS test next year.
mistake:
I will studying. ❌
I will study. ✅
ieltsTip: Berguna saat menjawab pertanyaan tentang future plans di Speaking.

exercise.q: I ___ prepare for HSK next month.

simple: Digunakan untuk pengalaman, hasil yang masih terasa sekarang, atau kejadian yang dimulai di masa lalu dan masih relevan.
example: I have learned English for three years.
mistake:
I have learn English. ❌
I have learned English. ✅
ieltsTip: Bagus untuk Speaking Part 1 dan 3 saat membahas pengalaman hidup.

simple: Digunakan ketika fokus pada objek/hasil, bukan pelaku.
formula:
S + be + V3
Example: The report is written by students.
example: The data is collected from online surveys.
mistake:
The data collected by students. ❌
The data is collected by students. ✅
ieltsTip: Sangat berguna untuk Writing Task 1 process diagram.

exercise.q: The essay ___ checked by the teacher.

simple: Digunakan untuk kemungkinan, imajinasi, dan akibat dari kondisi tertentu.
formula:
Zero: If + present, present
First: If + present, will + V1
Second: If + past, would + V1
example: If students practice daily, they will improve faster.
mistake:
If I will study, I will pass. ❌
If I study, I will pass. ✅
ieltsTip: Menaikkan grammar range di Writing Task 2 dan Speaking Part 3.

exercise.q: If I study hard, I ___ improve.
If I had more time, I ___ practice speaking.

simple: Digunakan untuk menambahkan informasi tentang noun tanpa membuat kalimat baru.
example: Students who read regularly usually have better vocabulary.
mistake:
The student which studies hard. ❌
The student who studies hard. ✅
ieltsTip: Membuat tulisan lebih kompleks dan natural.

exercise.q: The person ___ helped me is my teacher.
This is the book ___ I bought yesterday.
